meaning: n.椅子的背罩,装杂碎的容器adj.整齐的,整洁的,精简的vt.弄整齐,收拾,整理vi.整理,收拾adj.<口>可观的、相当大的
examples: They sat in her neat and tidy kitchen.
He lives alone in a suspiciously tidy apartment.
Except for the remarkably tidy kitchen, the place was a mess.
Having saved a tidy 20 grand or so also adds to one's sense of well-being.
They had accumulated a tidy stock portfolio and sent two of their three children to college.
